demo_goal: Predict passenger survival (demo — 800-row Titanic-style synthetic data)

recommendations: Scale numeric features with StandardScaler or MinMaxScaler before training.

task.reasoning: Target column `survived` matched from user description. User description suggests classification ('predict whether').

preprocessing_log: Numeric columns (5): median imputation + standard scaling.
Categorical columns (2): mode imputation + one-hot encoding.
Train/test split: 640 train rows, 160 test rows (20% test).

training_log: Parameter overrides applied for: LightGBM, Random Forest, XGBoost

Overfitting warnings: Random Forest is overfitting — train ROC-AUC 0.8889 vs test ROC-AUC 0.5131, gap 0.3758; Random Forest shows consistent overfitting across CV folds — CV train mean 0.9169 vs CV test mean 0.4587
5-fold cross-validation results: best model Logistic Regression achieved CV mean 0.5025 ± 0.0343 vs single test score 0.5139
